pages.title: Death's Scythe
pages.text: The Death Scythe is the preferred weapon of $(l:creatures/death)Death$(/l). It can be summoned by a player in full deathwear by using a $(l:artifacts/misc/hand_of_death)Death's Hand$(/l).

pages.title: Special Properties
pages.text: The Scythe can hit multiple creatures and cause the $(item)Chill Touch$() on each. The Scythe deals more damage the lower the wielder's $(item)Hunger$(). Also, Hunger and Health may be restored to the player if a creature is hit, based on how low the wielder's Hunger is.
